chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P No.D-1206 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on M.A 5555/17 3. For hearing of main case. 06.03.2019 None present for the petitioners. No intimation is received. This petition was filed on 03.05.2017, since then no one has ever appeared which shows that the petitioners have no interest to pursue this petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
